cards.title: The channel mix is not linear
Partners are part of the model
cards.body: Partners can create demand when their recommendation opens a matching hotel offer and carries source attribution into booking value.

cards.title: Booking paths matter more than slogans
cards.body: A hotel can talk about direct booking all day, but the guest needs a clean path to the exact room, package, add-on, event, dining, spa, or experience.

items.question: What changed in direct distribution?
items.answer: Demand is more distributed across social, Partners, platforms, and AI discovery, so hotels need more than a website booking path.

items.question: Is this only for large hotels?
items.answer: No. Independent hotels and groups can start with a small set of clear offers and source tracking.

items.question: Where should I read more?
items.answer: Start with the direct hotel distribution resource.

fields.heading: Ready to make hotel demand bookable?
fields.body: Start with the route that matches your team, then move into a focused demo or sign-up flow.

faqQuestions: Is this only for large hotels?
